nasb.text: All who pass along the way Clap their hands in derision at you; They hiss and shake their heads At the daughter of Jerusalem, “Is this the city of which they said, ‘The perfection of beauty, A joy to all the earth’?”

esv.text: All who pass along the way clap their hands at you; they hiss and wag their heads at the daughter of Jerusalem: “Is this the city that was called the perfection of beauty, the joy of all the earth?”

cnv.text: 所有過路的人，都拍掌嘲笑你； 他們嗤笑耶路撒冷的居民，並搖頭說： “被人稱為最完美，為全地所喜悅的，就是這城嗎？”

ccb.text: 路人都拍掌嘲笑你。 他们向耶路撒冷城摇头， 嗤笑道： “这就是那被誉为完美无瑕、 普世喜悦的城吗？”
